name: boomerang
description: Monorepo root — run scripts in news-feed/ or use npm run dev below

scripts.build: npm ci --prefix news-feed && npm run build --prefix news-feed
scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix news-feed && npm ci --prefix rss-worker
scripts.docs:types: npm run docs:api --prefix platform-worker && npm run docs:api --prefix news-feed
scripts.docs:api: npm run docs:types && npm run docs:rest
